creator: freebsd@nagilum.org
text:
root@cakebox /usr/ports/net/rsync > make clean install
===>  Cleaning for popt-1.16
===>  Cleaning for rsync-3.1.1_1
                                                                                
                                                                                
  ┌─────────────────────────── rsync-3.1.1_1 ──────────────────────────────┐    
  │ ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │    
  │ │+[x] DOCS       Build and/or install documentation                  │ │    
  │ │ [x] ICONV      Encoding conversion support via iconv               │ │    
  │ │ [x] POPT_PORT  Use popt from devel/popt instead of bundled one     │ │    
  │ │ [x] SSH        Use SSH instead of RSH                              │ │    
  │ │ [x] ZLIB_BASE  Use zlib from base instead of bundled one (BROKEN)  │ │    
  │ │─────────── Functionality provided by third party patches ──────────│ │    
  │ │ (*) TIMELIMIT  Time limit patch                                    │ │    
  │ │ ( ) RENAMED    Add support for renamed file detection              │ │    
  │ │ ( ) FLAGS      File system flags support patch, adds --fileflags   │ │    
  │ │ ( ) ATIMES     Preserve access times, adds --atimes                │ │    
  │ │ ( ) ACL        Add backward-compatibility for the --acls option    │ │    
  │ └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │    
  ├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤    
  │                     <  OK  >           <Cancel>                        │    
  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

===>   popt-1.16 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ccache - found
===>   popt-1.16 depends on shared library: libiconv.so.3^C
root@cakebox /usr/ports/net/rsync > pkg info -o popt
popt-1.16                      devel/popt
